subcodes.first_line: O ye thinkers! When the realities of creation are unveiled, all beings shall be perceived in a state of utter dependence, and the elements [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متفکران چون کشف حقایق کائنات شود جمیع اعیان در حیز افتقار مشاهده گردد عناصر
subcodes.subjects: @mind as intermediary between soul and body, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @intelligible vs. perceptible realities, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @man's distinction from the animal, @ether; the phenomenon of light
